panels.description: All assets that are associated with the specified portfolio(s), types and status values

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS NumberofCIs
FROM 
          `AST:BaseElement` BE
           INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
WHERE 
   BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'AND
   BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType) AND 
   AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio) AND
   AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by') AND 
   BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus) AND
   (BE.`Mark As Deleted` IS NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
      COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `MissingEOL`
FROM 
      `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE
          INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
          ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
            ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
WHERE 
  BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName IN ($AssetType)
  AND PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL
  AND AP.`Full Name`  IN ($Portfolio)
  AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
  AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
  AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `NotScheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
       ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
          LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
          ON (BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02` )
             LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
             ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
      
WHERE 
    BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
    AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
    AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
    AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
    AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
    AND (CA.`Request ID02` IS NULL OR CHG.`Description` IS NULL OR NOT (CHG.`Description` LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%') OR (CHG.`Change Request Status` IN ('Cancelled','Completed','Closed')))
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0)
    AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `Scheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
     LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
     ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
     LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS
     ON (BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request ID02` )
     LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
         ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request ID01`
      
WHERE 
    BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
    AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
    AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
    AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
    AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
    AND (CHG.Description  LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%'))     
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0)
    AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

panels.description: Assets close to the end of support or extended support. Use the dropdown to specify the number of days that defines close.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `NotScheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
        LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
        ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
          LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
          ON ( BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02` )
            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
            ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
      
WHERE 
   AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio) 
    AND BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
    AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
    AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
    AND (CA.`Request ID02` IS NULL OR CHG.`Description` IS NULL OR NOT (CHG.`Description` LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%') OR (CHG.`Change Request Status` IN ('Cancelled','Completed','Closed')))
    AND 
     /* (
       (((DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays or PMV.`EndOfSupport` is null)
       AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) < $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL))) 
        OR 
         (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays)
         AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) < $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL))) 
         OR 
       ((DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays)
    )))
    AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)*/

 
  (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=$CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)
   AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=$CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
   AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) <=$CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
   AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
   AND  (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) > 0 OR DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) > 0 or DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) > 0)


    AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `Scheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE   
     INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
       ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02`
         INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
         ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
         LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
            ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`BMC.CORE:BMC_BaseRelationship` BRP
            ON ( BE.`Instance Id` = BRP.`Destination.InstanceId`)
              LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem` BC
              ON (BRP.`Source.InstanceId`  =  BC.`Instance Id`) AND ( BE.`Data Set Id`  =  BC.`Data Set Id` )

WHERE
  BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
  AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
  AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND CA.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change'
  AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
  AND (BRP.`Source.ClassId` = 'BMC_COMPUTERSYSTEM' OR BRP.`Source.ClassId`IS NULL)
  AND 
     (
       ((DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) < $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL))) 
        OR 
         (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays)AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) < $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL))) 
         OR 
       ((DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) BETWEEN 0 AND $CloseToEOSDays)
    )))
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) >=0
  AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS `Failed`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE   
     INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
       ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02` 
         INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
         ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
           LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
           ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
            

WHERE
  BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
  AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
  AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND CA.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change'
  AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
  AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
  AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) > 0) AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=$CloseToEOSDays)
  AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), BE.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
  AND CHG.Description  LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%'
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) < 0
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) >= -180
  AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
            ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request ID01`
      

WHERE         
    BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' 
    AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
    AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
    AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
    AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
    AND ((BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request Description01`  IS NULL) OR (CHG.`Description` IS NULL) OR (NOT (CHG.Description  LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%')) OR (CHG.`Change Request Status` IN ('Cancelled','Completed','Closed')))
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)

panels.title: Support Ended

panels.description: Uses EOL and EOS dates from the product catalog

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
CASE
WHEN PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL AND (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) AND PMV.EndOfExtendedSupport IS NULL THEN 'EOL Not Defined'
WHEN PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.EndOfExtendedSupport IS NULL AND PMV.EndOfSecuritySupport IS NULL THEN 'EOS Not Defined'
WHEN ((DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL)  AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) < 0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) < 0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)) THEN 'Support Ended'
WHEN ((DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <= $CloseToEOSDays) OR (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)) AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <= $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL) THEN 'Supported but Close to EOS'
WHEN (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL) AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <= 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) > 0 THEN 'On Extended Support'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) >=0 THEN 'Supported but EOL'
ELSE 'Fully Supported'
END AS LifeCycleExpiry,
Count(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS  CountOfAssets
FROM
`AST:BaseElement` BE
  INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
     LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
     ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
Where 
BE.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
and BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` IS NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')
Group By
LifeCycleExpiry

panels.title: End of Support Breakdown

panels.description: Uses EOL and EOS dates from the product catalog

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Reconciliation Identity`) AS `SupportExpiryCount`,
CASE
WHEN NOT (PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL) and PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` > PMV.`EndOfSupport` THEN DATE(PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`)
WHEN NOT (PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL) and PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` > PMV.`EndOfSupport` THEN DATE(PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`)
WHEN NOT (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) THEN DATE(PMV.`EndOfSupport`)
ELSE DATE(PMV.`EndOfLife`)
END as SupportExpiryDate
FROM
`AST:BaseElement` BE
  INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
       ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
Where 
BE.`Data Set Id` = ('BMC.ASSET')
AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
and BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` IS NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')
group by SupportExpiryDate

AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` IS NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT

Count(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) AS  AssetsEndOfSupport
FROM
`AST:BaseElement` BE
  INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP

text.fixed: Assets Within Support or Extended Support

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
/* Assets that are out of support without being scheduled */
SELECT
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) * 100.0 / $AssetsUnderManagement AS `NotScheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
        LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS
        ON ( BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request ID02` )
          LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
          ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
            ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request ID01`
      

WHERE         
    BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' 
    AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
    AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
    AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
    AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
    AND ((BT_AST_CMDB_ASSOCIATIONS.`Request Description01`  IS NULL) OR (CHG.`Description` IS NULL) OR (NOT (CHG.Description  LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%')) OR (CHG.`Change Request Status` IN ('Cancelled','Completed','Closed')))
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
    AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
    AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

/* Scheduled For Remediation */
SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) * 100.0 / $AssetsNeedingRemediation  AS `Scheduled`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE   
     INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
       ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02`
         INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
         ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
           LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
           ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
             LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`BMC.CORE:BMC_BaseRelationship` BRP
             ON ( BE.`Instance Id` = BRP.`Destination.InstanceId`)
               LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem` BC
               ON (BRP.`Source.InstanceId`  =  BC.`Instance Id`) AND ( BE.`Data Set Id`  =  BC.`Data Set Id` )

WHERE
  BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
  AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
  AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND CA.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change'
  AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
  AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
  AND (BRP.`Source.ClassId` = 'BMC_COMPUTERSYSTEM' OR BRP.`Source.ClassId`IS NULL)
  AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
    AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) >=0
  AND CHG.Description  LIKE '%' + ${CRQKeyword} + '%'
  AND NOT (CHG.`Change Request Status` IN ('Cancelled','Completed','Closed'))
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) > 0
  AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

/* Failed Remediation */ 
SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) * 100.0 / $AssetsUnderManagement  AS `Failed`

FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE
     INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
       ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02` 
         INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
         ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
           LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
           ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
            

WHERE
  BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
  AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
  AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND CA.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change'
  AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
  AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
  AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL)
    AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
    AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) < 0
  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), CHG.`Scheduled End Date`) >= -180
  AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) * 100.0 / $AssetsUnderManagement  AS `Supported`
FROM 
          `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE
          INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
          ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
             LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
             ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
WHERE      
     BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
     AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName IN ($AssetType) 
     AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
     AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
     AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
     AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) >= 0 OR DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) >= 0 OR DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) >= 0)
     AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT 
          COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`Instance Id`) * 100.0 / $AssetsUnderManagement AS `MissingEOS`
FROM 
          `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE
          INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
          ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
             LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
             ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
WHERE 
   BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET'
   AND BE.UserDisplayObjectName  IN ($AssetType)
   AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL 
   AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL
   AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
   AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
   AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
   AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')

SELECT DISTINCT
  BE.Name AS `AssetName`,
  BE.`Short Description` AS `AssetDescription`,
  BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` AS `AssetType`,
  BE.`Class Id` AS `Class`,
  BE.`Reconciliation Identity` AS `Instance`,
  BE.`Serial Number` AS `SerialNumber`,
  BE.AssetLifecycleStatus AS `AssetLifecycleStatus`,
  BE.`Model Number` AS `Product`,
  BE.`MarketVersion` AS `Version`,
  BE.`Manufacturer Name+` AS `ManufacturerName`,
  BE.`LastScanDate`,
  PMV.`EndOfLife` AS `EndOfLife`,
  PMV.`EndOfSupport` AS `EndOfSupport`,
  PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` AS `EndOfExtendedSupport`,
  MAX(BC.`Name`) AS `HostName`,
  MAX(BC.`CapabilityList`) AS `CapabilityList`,
  MAX(BRP.`ClassId`) as `HostRelationship`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE   
     INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
       ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
            LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`BMC.CORE:BMC_BaseRelationship` BRP
            ON ( BE.`Instance Id` = BRP.`Destination.InstanceId`)
              LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem` BC
              ON (BRP.`Source.InstanceId`  =  BC.`Instance Id`) AND ( BE.`Data Set Id`  =  BC.`Data Set Id` )
                  LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CMDB Associations` CA
                  ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = CA.`Request ID02`
                     LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
                     ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = CA.`Request ID01`
WHERE
   AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
   AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
   AND BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)

   --AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=$CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL)
   AND (DATEDIFF('day',currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <=$CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)

   AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport` IS NULL)
   AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted` = 'No')
GROUP BY
   BE.Name,

   BE.`UserDisplayObjectName`,
   BE.`Reconciliation Identity`,
   BE.`Class Id`,
   BE.`Serial Number`,
   BE.AssetLifecycleStatus,
   BE.`Model Number`,
   BE.`MarketVersion`,
   BE.`Manufacturer Name+`,
   BE.`LastScanDate`,
   PMV.`EndOfLife`,
   PMV.`EndOfSupport`,
   PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`

panels.title: Remediation Change Requests

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
BE.`Name` AS  `AssetName`,
BE.`Short Description` AS `AssetDescription`,
BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` AS `AssetType`,
BE.`Class Id` AS `Class`,
BE.AssetLifecycleStatus AS `AssetStatus`,
BE.`Reconciliation Identity` AS `Instance`,
CASE
WHEN PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL AND (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) AND PMV.EndOfExtendedSupport IS NULL THEN 'EOL Not Defined'
WHEN PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.EndOfExtendedSupport IS NULL THEN 'EOS Not Defined'
WHEN (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL)  AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) < 0 OR PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) < 0 OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL) THEN 'Support Ended'
WHEN (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <= 0 OR PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL) AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) < 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) > 0 THEN 'On Extended Support'
WHEN ((DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) <= $CloseToEOSDays) OR (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL)) AND (DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`) <= $CloseToEOSDays OR PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL) THEN 'Supported but Close to EOS'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfLife`) <=0  AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), PMV.`EndOfSupport`) >=0 THEN 'Supported but EOL'
ELSE 'Fully Supported'
END AS LifeCycleExpiry,
CASE
WHEN PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL AND (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) THEN PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`
WHEN PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL THEN PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`
WHEN PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL AND NOT (PMV.`EndOfLife`IS NULL) THEN PMV.`EndOfLife`
WHEN NOT (PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` IS NULL) AND PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` > PMV.`EndOfSupport` THEN PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`
WHEN NOT (PMV.`EndOfSupport` IS NULL) THEN PMV.`EndOfSupport`
ELSE PMV.`EndOfSecuritySupport`
END AS SupportExpiryDate,
BE.`EndOfLife`
FROM
`AST:BaseElement` BE
  INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
     ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
       LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
       ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
Where 
BE.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
and BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
AND (BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL OR BE.`Mark As Deleted`= 'No')
AND ($ObsolescenceState = 'All' OR LifeCycleExpiry = $ObsolescenceState)
ORDER BY LifeCycleExpiry, BE.Name

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
BE.`Manufacturer Name+` + ' ' + BE.`Model Number` + ' ' + BE.`Version Number` as `CMDB_Product`,
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 1` AS 'Tier1',
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 2` AS 'Tier2',
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 3` AS 'Tier3',
PMV.`EndOfSupport` AS 'EndOfSupport',
PMV.`EndOfLife` AS 'EndOfLife',
PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport` AS 'EndOfExtendedSupport',
PMV.`Product Model/Version State` AS 'State',
PMV.`Market Version` AS 'MarketVersion',
COUNT(BE.`Instance Id`) AS `NumberofCIs`
FROM
    `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement` BE
          INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AP
          ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = AP.AssetInstanceId
             LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`PDL:ProductModelVersion` PMV
             ON BE.`Model Number` = PMV.`Product Name` AND BE.`Manufacturer Name+` = PMV.`Manufacturer` AND BE.`Version Number` = PMV.`Product Model/Version`
WHERE 
(
BE.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
AND BE.AssetLifecycleStatus IN ($AssetLifeCycleStatus)
and BE.`UserDisplayObjectName` IN ($AssetType)
AND AP.`Full Name` IN ($Portfolio)
AND AP.`PersonRole` IN ('Managed by','Supported by', 'Owned by')
)
AND BE.`Mark As Deleted` is NULL
GROUP BY
`CMDB_Product`,
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 1`,
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 2`,
PMV.`Product Categorization Tier 3`,
PMV.`EndOfSupport`,
PMV.`EndOfLife`,
PMV.`EndOfExtendedSupport`,
PMV.`Product Model/Version State`,
PMV.`Market Version`
ORDER BY
NumberofCIs desc

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT   
 PMV.`Product Name` as `Product`,   
 PMV.`Manufacturer`,   
 PMV.`Product Model/Version` as `Version`,   
 BE.`EndOfLife` AS `BE_EndOfLife`,   
 PMV.`EndOfLife` AS `CAT_EndOfLife`,   
 BE.`EndOfSupport` AS `BE_EOS`,   
 PMV.`EndOfSupport` as `CAT_EOS`,
 BE.`NormalizationStatus` as `Normalization`,
 'Inconsistent' AS `Data_Issue`,
 COUNT(DISTINCT BE.`InstanceId`) as `InconsistentCIs`
 FROM `PCT:Product Model-Version` PMV   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN `BMC.CORE:BMC_BaseElement` BE   
  ON PMV.`Product Name` = BE.`Model`    
     AND PMV.`Manufacturer` = BE.`ManufacturerName`    
     AND PMV.`Product Model/Version` = BE.`VersionNumber`   
 WHERE BE.`DatasetId` = 'BMC.ADDM' AND BE.`EndOfSupport` IS NOT NULL AND PMV.`EndOfSupport` <> BE.`EndOfSupport`
 GROUP BY PMV.`Product Name`, PMV.`Manufacturer`, PMV.`Product Model/Version`,
 BE.`EndOfLife`,   
 PMV.`EndOfLife`,   
 BE.`EndOfSupport`,   
 PMV.`EndOfSupport`,
 BE.`NormalizationStatus`
 order by `InconsistentCIs` desc
